source: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System — 2026 Supervisory Stress Test Scenarios
note: Values transcribed verbatim from Table 3.A/3.B (baseline) and Table 4.A/4.B (severely adverse) of the final published PDF (no Fed-published CSV/XLSX exists for this release; PDF is the canonical source). 28 variables total: 16 domestic + 12 international per scenario, matching the Fed's published variable count.
